Snippet.title: Snippet
Snippet.description: An HTML code snippet stored in the vault, potentially containing multiple files and tags.

title.description: The title or description of the snippet.

tags.description: A list of tags for categorization.

files.description: A collection of files belonging to this snippet.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the snippet was created.

/snippets/{snippetId}.description: PUBLIC_ACCESS_VERIFIED: This collection is explicitly open to the public for reading and writing. No authentication is required for any operation. allow read, write: if true;
